⚡ About ZyNi SMC
Smart Money. Real Edge.

ZyNi SMC is a professional-grade Smart Money Concepts screener built for serious crypto traders who want to trade alongside institutional players.

🎯 What is Smart Money Concepts?

Smart Money Concepts (SMC) is a trading methodology that follows the footprints of institutional traders — banks, hedge funds and market makers. Instead of chasing retail indicators, SMC traders identify Order Blocks, Fair Value Gaps and liquidity zones where big money is positioned. ZyNi SMC automates this process across 400+ pairs in real time.

📦 Our 6 SMC Modules
📊 Order Blocks
Detect institutional supply & demand zones near current price across all timeframes.
⚡ Fair Value Gaps
Find price imbalances with live Buy/Sell pressure and impulse scoring.
🔥 Breaker Blocks
Identify mitigated OBs that have flipped — high probability reversal zones.
📐 Fibonacci
Auto-detect swing legs and scan for 0.618, 0.705 and 0.786 retracement levels.
📈 Live Monitor
Watch all your pairs across 3 timeframes with auto-refresh every 30 seconds.
🎯 Bias Detection
Multi-gate signal engine — only momentum-confirmed, volume-backed signals pass.
💡 Why ZyNi SMC?

Most screeners show you basic price data. ZyNi SMC shows you where the money actually is. With institutional order book data, imbalance analysis and multi-timeframe scanning — you're no longer guessing. You're trading with information that was previously only available to professional desks.

📖 User Guide
How to Use ZyNi SMC

Follow these steps to get the most out of every feature in the screener.

1
Login & Access
Click "Launch App" on the homepage. Enter your username and password in the drop-in login box. Once inside you'll see the main scan dashboard with all modules available.
2
Running a Scan
Select your modules (OB, FVG, FIB, BB) from the settings panel. Choose your timeframe (15m, 1H, 4H). Click Scan — results appear ranked by score from 0–100. Higher score = stronger setup.
3
Reading Order Block Results
Each OB card shows: distance from price, zone strength %, consolidation candle count and OI direction. Click "Zone Liquidity" to see the full institutional order book inside the zone.
4
Using FVG Imbalance
Click "Check Imbalance" on any FVG card to see live Buy vs Sell % inside the gap. The impulse score 0–100 tells you how strong the imbalance is. Untouched + High Vol = best setups.
5
Live Monitor Setup
Go to the Live Monitor tab. Type a pair (e.g. BTCUSDT) and click ADD. The card loads all SMC zones across 15m, 1H and 4H automatically. Enable Auto Scan for hands-free monitoring.
6
Bias Detection Tips
Set minimum gates to 2 or 3 for cleaner signals. Enable FVG Confluence for highest probability setups. Use the 1D timeframe for macro bias and 1H for entry timing. Always check Live Order Flow for confirmation.

We don't provide any signals — we provide ready-made setups across 1000+ pairs, just one click away.

This is not for beginners — this is for traders already familiar with SMC methods like Order Blocks, Fair Value Gaps, Fibonacci, and Breaker Blocks.

SMC Modules

Everything to trade smart money

Six professional tools — scan, detect and act on every Smart Money setup across 400+ pairs.

📊 Module 01

Order Block Detection

Scan 400+ pairs in one tap. Every Order Block near price appears instantly — score, strength and direction across 15m, 1H and 4H.

⚡ Module 02

Fair Value Gap & Imbalance

Check live Buy vs Sell pressure inside any FVG. Impulse score 0–100 tells you if the gap will hold or fill — before you enter.

🔥 Module 03

Breaker Block Detection

Catch flipped OBs the moment they become Breakers. HIGH PROB fires when FVG overlaps — the best reversal zones, found automatically.

📐 Module 04

Fibonacci Retracement

Auto-detect dominant swing legs. Get alerted at 0.618, 0.705 and 0.786 across every pair — the exact levels institutions react to.

📈 Module 05

Live Monitor Dashboard

All SMC zones load automatically — OBs, FVGs, Fibs and Breakers across 3 timeframes. Everything live, zero manual work.

🎯 Module 06

Bias Detection System

See directional bias signals across the full market. Momentum confirmed, volume backed — only strong setups reach you.
